nasb.text: Then the king’s servants who were at the king’s gate said to Mordecai, “Why are you transgressing the king’s command?”

esv.text: Then the king’s servants who were at the king’s gate said to Mordecai, “Why do you transgress the king’s command?”

cnv.text: 於是在朝門的臣僕問末底改：“你為甚麼違背王的命令呢？”

ccb.text: 在宫门供职的臣仆问末底改：“你为何违抗王的命令？”
